feat.name: Invulnerable Rager
feat.text: Even the heaviest armors serve only to enhance your unbridled fury. You are trained in heavy armor. Whenever you gain a barbarian class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in medium armor, you also gain that proficiency in heavy armor. If you have the Quick-Tempered action, you can use it while wearing heavy armor.

traits.name: Barbarian
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the barbarian class.
